name: Hexpire
short_description: Hexpire is a relaxing city builder where you build a prosperous empire by careful building placement.
detailed_description:
Hexpire is the perfect game for those who would like to play a relaxing citybuilder but with some strategy and a little bit of brain usage! The gameplay revolve around the primary mechanic of careful building placement to make your empire the wealthiest it could be! Besides placing buildings you also can shape the world around you by buying hexagon tiles to expand your island.

Hexpire can and wants to be played forever! With 3 different modes and a highscore to chase, can you go from a beginner highscore to a Champion? If you enjoy strategic games that aren't confusing and hard to get into, or want a game to unwind at the end of a long day, well what are you waiting for? Hexpire awaits!

Epilepsy Warning: Contains Bright Visuals
